title: Dense-trend ema_cross on XAU D1 falsified on valid data: +5.18 was a pre-cache-fix artifact; camino_d positives are 2020+ window selection
source: Reproduction 2026-05-28 of option C (promote dense ema_cross to first-survivor audit).
why: The +5.18 baseline came from results/clf_xau_d1.pre_cache_fix (987 events) — a run BEFORE an applied FRED-cache fix that dropped most events via NaN, leaving a non-representative subset. Re-running the CURRENT configs/xau_d1.yaml (identical good geometry tp=3.0/sl=1.0/h=40, n_folds=3) on corrected data: n_events=4103, baseline_sharpe_per_fold=[-2.67,-0.25,3.06] (median negative), meta dead/negative (all trades fold 0 at negative Sharpe; stack=false, 0/4 models beat baseline, max_pair_corr 0.94). The camino_d/multi_d1.yaml XAU run with positive baseline [3.88,2.95,5.1] (916 events, engaging meta, +Sharpes 2/3 folds) only scores positive because date_range starts 2020-06 (a gold bull window) = period selection, not robustness. NET: option C is FALSIFIED; no credible dense-trend survivor on XAU D1 over the full honest 22y window. Barrier geometry was a real MEASUREMENT fix, not edge.
value_rationale: H: corrects a load-bearing belief steering strategy choice; prevents a wasted phase5 audit on a stale/window-selected number and redirects first-survivor search to cross-asset breadth (B0009).
scope: Documented the C falsification (this entry + memory correction project_barrier_geometry_root_cause).
Treat any single-favorable-window (e.g. 2020+) positive as period selection unless it also holds on the full history.
Redirect first-survivor search to cross-asset breadth (B0009): find instrument+primary with positive baseline on its FULL honest window AND enough events for the meta to engage.

history.reason: chore(backlog): quiesce cross-session reconciliation + B0079 prereq + B0068 done
